item.description: The Supreme Court has ruled to allow the Trump administration to end the Temporary Protected Status for thousands of immigrants from Haiti and Syria. NBC News' Gary Grumbach reports on the court's split among ideological lines and how the ruling impacts the administration's immigration policies.

media:content.media:title: Supreme Court allows Trump to end protected status for Haitian and Syrian immigrants
media:content.media:description: The Supreme Court has ruled to allow the Trump administration to end the Temporary Protected Status for thousands of immigrants from Haiti and Syria. NBC News' Gary Grumbach reports on the court's split among ideological lines and how the ruling impacts the administration's immigration policies.

item.title: Supreme Court allows Trump to end protected status for Haitian and Syrian immigrants

item.dc:creator: NBC News
item.description: We’re awaiting several major decisions from the Supreme Court before the end of the 2026 term, including the high court’s rulings on birthright citizenship and whether President Donald Trump has the authority to unilaterally fire Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook

media:content.media:text: Laura Jarrett in studio.
media:content.media:description: Laura Jarrett.

item.title: Send your Supreme Court questions for Laura Jarrett

item.description: Ana Vanessa Herrero, reporting for NBC News in Venezuela, sheds light on the hundreds of people looking for loved ones who might be missing under the rubble after two major earthquakes hit near the country's capital on Wednesday.

media:content.media:title: NBC News reporter in Venezuela says people she knows might be missing under rubble
media:content.media:description: Ana Vanessa Herrero, reporting for NBC News in Venezuela, sheds light on the hundreds of people looking for loved ones who might be missing under the rubble after two major earthquakes hit near the country's capital on Wednesday.

item.title: NBC News reporter in Venezuela says people she knows might be missing under rubble

item.description: Pedro Vite asistió a Nilson Angulo, quien sacó un potente remate de derecha desde fuera del área que se coló por el lado derecho de la portería para igualar el marcador ante Alemania.

media:content.media:title: ¡Nilson Angulo sorprende con un golazo ante Alemania!
media:content.media:description: Pedro Vite asistió a Nilson Angulo, quien sacó un potente remate de derecha desde fuera del área que se coló por el lado derecho de la portería para igualar el marcador ante Alemania.

item.title: ¡Nilson Angulo sorprende con un golazo ante Alemania!

item.dc:creator: David K. Li
item.description: Alex Freeman, son of former Green Bay Packers wideout Antonio Freeman, has stepped up for the U.S. men’s national team in the World Cup. It’s no surprise to his father.

media:content.media:text: USA v Australia: Group D - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Alex Freeman of the United States celebrates after the team's 2-0 victory in the World Cup Group D match against Australia at Seattle Stadium on Friday.

media:content.media:text: Receiver Antonio Freeman #86 of the Green Bay Packers
media:content.media:description: Alex Freeman of the United States celebrates after the team's 2-0 victory in the World Cup Group D match against Australia at Seattle Stadium on Friday.

media:content.media:text: Alex Freeman #16 of the United States
media:content.media:description: Alex Freeman of the United States celebrates after the team's 2-0 victory in the World Cup Group D match against Australia at Seattle Stadium on Friday.

item.title: Football vs. fútbol: Who is the best Freeman? Dad Antonio salutes son Alex

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: George Weah won the Ballon d’Or in 1995 and is considered one of the best soccer players of his generation. Now, his son is carving his own path on the U.S. men’s national team.

media:content.media:text: United States Portraits - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

media:content.media:text: Timothy Weah of United States
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

media:content.media:text: George Weah holding the Ballon D'Or in 1995; Timothy Weah holding the Coppa Italia in 2024.
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

media:content.media:text: On-field action during World Cup Qatar 2022.
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

media:content.media:text: George Weah, President of Liberia
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

item.title: Out from his father’s shadow, Tim Weah is carving his own path with the U.S.

item.dc:creator: David Hickey
item.description: A Brazilian side that featured Neymar sealed the top spot in Group C with a 3-0 win over Scotland yesterday, while the co-hosts Canada progressed to the knockouts for the first time in its history

media:content.media:text: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Scotland's Tartan Army Gather for Brazil match
media:content.media:description: Scotland fans play bagpipes as Scotland's Tartan Army travel to Miami Stadium for the match between Scotland and Brazil on June 24.

media:content.media:text: Brazil's Vinicius Junior celebrates.
media:content.media:description: Scotland fans play bagpipes as Scotland's Tartan Army travel to Miami Stadium for the match between Scotland and Brazil on June 24.

media:content.media:text: Guillermo Ochoa #13 of Mexico is tossed into the air by his teammates after the team's 3-0 victory.
media:content.media:description: Scotland fans play bagpipes as Scotland's Tartan Army travel to Miami Stadium for the match between Scotland and Brazil on June 24.

media:content.media:text: Christian Pulisic.
media:content.media:description: Scotland fans play bagpipes as Scotland's Tartan Army travel to Miami Stadium for the match between Scotland and Brazil on June 24.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: Is the Tartan party over?

item.description: Las aficiones desbordan pasión en East Rutherford en un empate que ha sacado múltiples emociones entre los hinchas y entrenadores. Así se han gritado los goles en cada gol.

media:content.media:title: ¡Partidazo! Así lo vive el público en un intenso empate entre Alemania y Ecuador
media:content.media:description: Las aficiones desbordan pasión en East Rutherford en un empate que ha sacado múltiples emociones entre los hinchas y entrenadores. Así se han gritado los goles en cada gol.

item.title: ¡Partidazo! Así lo vive el público en un intenso empate entre Alemania y Ecuador

item.description: Pedro Vite asistió a Nilson Angulo, quien sacó un potente remate de derecha desde fuera del área que se coló por el lado derecho de la portería para igualar el marcador ante Alemania.

media:content.media:title: ¡Nilson Angulo sorprende con un golazo ante Alemania!

item.title: ¡Nilson Angulo sorprende con un golazo ante Alemania!

item.description: El delantero del Villarreal aprovechó un error en la defensa de Curazao para adelantar a la selección que estaría avanzando a la siguiente ronda como la segunda mejor del grupo.

media:content.media:title: Nicolas Pépé adelanta a Costa de Marfil: Grave error en la defensa de Curazao para el 0-1
media:content.media:description: El delantero del Villarreal aprovechó un error en la defensa de Curazao para adelantar a la selección que estaría avanzando a la siguiente ronda como la segunda mejor del grupo.

item.title: Nicolas Pépé adelanta a Costa de Marfil: Grave error en la defensa de Curazao para el 0-1

item.description: El jugador aprovechó el pase de Wirtz y disparó al borde del área para vencer a Galindez, apenas en el inicio del juego. La jugada fue reclamada por una supuesta falta pero fue validada luego por la juez central.

media:content.media:title: Alemania destapa la lata con gol de Sané apenas comenzando el juego
media:content.media:description: El jugador aprovechó el pase de Wirtz y disparó al borde del área para vencer a Galindez, apenas en el inicio del juego. La jugada fue reclamada por una supuesta falta pero fue validada luego por la juez central.

item.title: Alemania destapa la lata con gol de Sané apenas comenzando el juego

item.description: Moisés Caicedo y Piero Hincapié llenan de elogios a Enner Valencia, máximo goleador histórico de Ecuador y referente de la Tri. Sus compañeros destacan su liderazgo, su legado y la inspiración que representa dentro y fuera de la cancha.

media:content.media:title: Enner Valencia, el capitán que inspira a toda una generación | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Moisés Caicedo y Piero Hincapié llenan de elogios a Enner Valencia, máximo goleador histórico de Ecuador y referente de la Tri. Sus compañeros destacan su liderazgo, su legado y la inspiración que representa dentro y fuera de la cancha.

item.title: Enner Valencia, el capitán que inspira a toda una generación | Vive el Mundial

item.description: Alemania se prepara para su último partido en fase de grupos ante Ecuador. Ya clasificados, los teutones complicarán con su constancia y orgullo el pase ecuatoriano.

media:content.media:title: ¡Se encienden los motores alemanes! Neuer y compañía afinan detalles para enfrentar a Ecuador
media:content.media:description: Alemania se prepara para su último partido en fase de grupos ante Ecuador. Ya clasificados, los teutones complicarán con su constancia y orgullo el pase ecuatoriano.

item.title: ¡Se encienden los motores alemanes! Neuer y compañía afinan detalles para enfrentar a Ecuador

item.description: El entrenador de Alemania se refirió al calor que enfrentarán en el último juego de fase de grupos ante Ecuador y reconoció que deben adaptarse a cualquier condición, además de hablar sobre los minutos que podrían jugar los suplentes.

media:content.media:title: Nagelsmann: "Debemos ser resilientes y adaptarnos a todas las condiciones de los juegos"
media:content.media:description: El entrenador de Alemania se refirió al calor que enfrentarán en el último juego de fase de grupos ante Ecuador y reconoció que deben adaptarse a cualquier condición, además de hablar sobre los minutos que podrían jugar los suplentes.

item.title: Nagelsmann: "Debemos ser resilientes y adaptarnos a todas las condiciones de los juegos"

item.description: Alemania quiere dar un golpe de autoridad a Ecuador y consolidarse de nuevo como una potencia digna del título mundial.

media:content.media:title: ¡Que empiece el show! Alemania está llegando para demostrarle al mundo que son candidatos al título
media:content.media:description: Alemania quiere dar un golpe de autoridad a Ecuador y consolidarse de nuevo como una potencia digna del título mundial.

item.title: ¡Que empiece el show! Alemania está llegando para demostrarle al mundo que son candidatos al título

item.description: Ecuador llega a East Rutherford con la presión de conseguir la victoria ante Alemania para seguir en el Mundial. Un empate o derrota se traduce en la eliminación de la Tri.

media:content.media:title: ¡Todo o nada! Ecuador llega a New York con el objetivo de mantenerse con vida en el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Ecuador llega a East Rutherford con la presión de conseguir la victoria ante Alemania para seguir en el Mundial. Un empate o derrota se traduce en la eliminación de la Tri.

item.title: ¡Todo o nada! Ecuador llega a New York con el objetivo de mantenerse con vida en el Mundial

item.description: El técnico de la Tri sabe que necesitan un buen resultado si quieren seguir con vida dentro de la Copa del Mundo 2026.

media:content.media:title: El mensaje esperanzador de Sebastián Beccacece previo al duelo de Ecuador contra Alemania
media:content.media:description: El técnico de la Tri sabe que necesitan un buen resultado si quieren seguir con vida dentro de la Copa del Mundo 2026.

item.title: El mensaje esperanzador de Sebastián Beccacece previo al duelo de Ecuador contra Alemania

item.dc:creator: Natasha Korecki
Allan Smith
item.description: A trio of primary results in New York City this week is deepening a schism among Democrats over who should lead the party and determine its direction as the midterms approach — and as the 2028 presidential race looms not far beyond

media:content.media:text: NYC Votes In Lively Primaries, With Suburban Race Key To House
media:content.media:description: Zohran Mamdani, mayor of New York, campaigns with Brad Lander, former New York City comptroller and US Democratic House candidate for New York, and Illapa Sairitupac, Democratic New York State assembly candidate, not pictured, during a primary election in New York, US, on Tuesday, June 23, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Brad Lander,Zohran Mamdani
media:content.media:description: Democratic congressional candidate Brad Lander, second right, arrives with Mamdani for an election night watch party on Tuesday.

item.title: Democratic rift over the party’s future widens amid the left’s New York victories

item.description: In a major reversal, Senate Republicans refused to rein in President Donald Trump’s war powers, hours after he chastised members of his own party for going against him. Earlier in the day, the president refused to take part in a planned ceremony to sign a bill overwhelmingly passed by both parties aimed at making housing affordable, until, he says, the Senate passes the SAVE Act, which would require voters show proof of ID and citizenship documents to vote. NBC’s Kelly O’Donnell reports fo

media:content.media:title: Senate Reverses Course on War Powers After Visit From Trump
media:content.media:description: In a major reversal, Senate Republicans refused to rein in President Donald Trump’s war powers, hours after he chastised members of his own party for going against him. Earlier in the day, the president refused to take part in a planned ceremony to sign a bill overwhelmingly passed by both parties aimed at making housing affordable, until, he says, the Senate passes the SAVE Act, which would require voters show proof of ID and citizenship documents to vote. NBC’s Kelly O’Donnell reports for TODAY.

item.title: Senate Reverses Course on War Powers After Visit From Trump

item.dc:creator: Ben Kamisar
Annelise Hanson
item.description: The NBC News poll asked American adults which historical event they thought was the country’s biggest accomplishment in its 250 years.

media:content.media:text: Buzz Aldrin Poses next To The U.S. flag On Moon
media:content.media:description: Astronaut Edwin "Buzz" Aldrin on July 20, 1969, during the Apollo 11 mission to the moon.

media:content.media:text: A word cloud of responses to a poll question about what Americans think the country's greatest achievement has been.
media:content.media:description: Astronaut Edwin "Buzz" Aldrin on July 20, 1969, during the Apollo 11 mission to the moon.

item.title: Civil rights, moon landings and war wins: What Americans see as the country’s greatest achievements

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: We’re tracking Amazon Prime Day deals live on day 3 and updating our list with editor-approved discounts. Shop tech, beauty, kitchen and more before sales end.
item.title: 327+ impressive Amazon Prime Day 2026 deals to shop on day 3: Apple, Yeti, Lego and more

item.description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

media:content.media:title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft
media:content.media:description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

item.title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft

item.dc:creator: The Politics Desk
item.description: In today’s edition, Adam Edelman explains why Wisconsin is set to serve as a major test of the extent of democratic socialists’ newfound clout.

media:content.media:text: Francesca Hong stands in front of a table with workers making posters at a booth with signage for her campaign
media:content.media:description: Democratic gubernatorial candidate and state Rep. Francesca Hong, D-Wis., during the 2026 Wisconsin Democratic Convention in Madison, Wis., on June 14, 2026.

item.title: Democratic socialists’ battleground test: From the Politics Desk

item.dc:creator: Francie Ebert
item.description: A parenting influencer in Georgia announced this week that his daughter drowned in a swimming pool

media:content.media:text: shared that his 2-year-old daughter drowned on Fathers day
media:content.media:description: Jamal Morton shared in an Instagram post that his 2-year-old daughter, Rose, drowned on Fathers day.

item.title: ‘I lost my daughter’: Parenting influencer says his 2-year-old drowned in swimming pool

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
item.description: A mother and her son have been identified as two of three skeletal remains found inside a Connecticut home that was recently bought at auction

media:content.media:text: A house is shrouded by trees in a forested area, a sign on the front of the property next to the path leading to the home reads "KEEP OUT"
media:content.media:description: A foreclosed property on Stanwich Lane in Burlington, Conn., in which skeletal remains of a mother and son were found.

item.title: Mother and son identified as skeletal remains found in Connecticut home bought at auction
